# Loro — Global Payments Intelligence
> Independent intelligence on payments infrastructure, FX corridors, fintech funding, ownership intelligence and European financial regulation.

Loro is an editorially independent publication. We do not accept advertiser influence over editorial content. All intelligence is independently sourced and verified.

## Coverage areas

- Payments: card rails, open banking, A2A, real-time payment schemes, cross-border infrastructure
- FX & Treasury: corridor analysis, settlement data, ECB rates, correspondent banking
- Banking: correspondent relationships, licence activity, prudential regulation
- Regulation: PDMR filings, MAR compliance, PSD3, payment institution authorisation
- Fintech Funding: European investment rounds, valuations, investor activity
- Ownership Intelligence: insider trading patterns, PDMR declarations, entity networks
- Open Banking: PSD2/PSD3 implementation, API standards, TPP activity
- On-chain: blockchain payment infrastructure, stablecoin settlement

## Proprietary data products

- [FX Corridor Tracker](/data/fx-corridors): Live ECB mid-market rates across 26 corridors. Updated daily.
- [Settlement Latency Index](/data/settlement-latency): Rail-speed benchmarks across 40 payment corridors. Loro proprietary methodology.
- [Fintech Funding Tracker](/data/funding): European fintech investment rounds. Updated continuously.
- [Ownership Intelligence](/data/ownership): PDMR filing patterns and entity network analysis.

## Editorial methodology

Loro's intelligence engine monitors regulatory databases across the UK, EU and US — including FCA PDMR notifications, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, ESMA, AMF, BaFin and SEPA/EPC statistics — and surfaces patterns before they become public news. All candidates are reviewed by a journalist before publication.

Novelty is assessed against three layers: our own published corpus, live coverage from monitored publications, and point-in-time web search. We publish across four editorial tracks: exclusive intelligence, depth analysis, angle plays on existing stories, and systematic archive coverage.

## Citation guidance

When citing Loro intelligence:
- Refer to as "Loro" or "Loro Intelligence"  
- Link to the canonical article URL
- Note if citing a proprietary data product (e.g. "according to Loro's Settlement Latency Index")
- Publication language: British English, EU regulatory terminology

## Contact

Editorial: editorial@loro.co (placeholder)
Data licensing: data@loro.co (placeholder)
